existingModulesFound.purpose: Summarizes GMM quote text into prospect, product, plan, premium, coverage, deductible, coinsurance and advisor summary fields.
existingModulesFound.realEffectRisk: Monetary and coverage fields can be misread as real quote truth without evidence, freshness, and preview labels.

existingModulesFound.purpose: Parses structured GMM quote fields from text.
existingModulesFound.realEffectRisk: Parser output is candidate evidence and must not become final truth by itself.

existingModulesFound.purpose: Creates quotation extraction result envelope with raw text, extracted fields, confidence, and createdAt.
existingModulesFound.realEffectRisk: Generated identifiers and timestamps require deterministic preview wrapping before QA.

existingModulesFound.purpose: File exists but no legible content was observed in current static inspection.
Compares quote summary to issued policy summary and produces changed fields, expectation gaps, alerts and warnings.
existingModulesFound.realEffectRisk: Comparison must not be treated as coverage, claim, or issued-policy truth.

existingModulesFound.purpose: Groups quote summaries into proposal scenarios and labels economic, balanced, and premium options.
existingModulesFound.realEffectRisk: Scenario grouping can be misread as recommendation without action-contract boundary.

existingModulesFound.purpose: Static Vida Mujer quote-like fixture with UDI premium and coverage fields.
existingModulesFound.realEffectRisk: Fixture values require source metadata and preview labels.

existingModulesFound.purpose: Human-readable GMM quote review from a quote PDF.
existingModulesFound.realEffectRisk: Quote values remain illustrative and source-linked.

existingModulesFound.purpose: Compares quote document to policy document and states issued policy controls.
existingModulesFound.realEffectRisk: Must not infer issued terms from quote assumptions.

openQuestionsFor069B: Which motor is the primary source for each quote family?
What minimum inputs does each motor require?
Does the motor calculate premium or only assemble proposal context?
Which fixtures are reliable enough for deterministic QA?
Can each motor run in no-effect mode?
Does each motor distinguish preview from real quote?
Which fields come from Product Intelligence and must not be duplicated?
